content:
## Page Section / Title
Elements

## All Verbatim Text
- "Brand Visuals & Guidelines | by Sightbox"
- "1.1"
- "Elements"
- "SHAPES"
- "These are free-form, abstract polyhedrons. Their polygonal shape aligns with the visual style of the Meerkats and serves as containers for city images."

## Visual Elements
- **Logos**: A small, black, geometric logo (resembling three stacked horizontal lines with a vertical line through the center) appears in the top-right corner. No additional logo details (shape, construction, proportions, clear space, minimum size, do/don't rules) are visible on this page.
- **Color palette**: The page uses a monochromatic color scheme with black lines on a white background. No named color swatches, HEX/RGB values, or additional colors are shown.
- **Typography**: 
  - Heading: "Elements" (bold, sans-serif typeface, large size)
  - Subheading: "SHAPES" (uppercase, sans-serif typeface, smaller than the heading)
  - Body copy: "These are free-form, abstract polyhedrons. Their polygonal shape aligns with the visual style of the Meerkats and serves as containers for city images." (regular, sans-serif typeface, smaller than the subheading)
  - Page header: "Brand Visuals & Guidelines | by Sightbox" (regular, sans-serif typeface, small size)
  - Page number: "1.1" (regular, sans-serif typeface, small size)
- **Imagery / photography**: The page features five black line-drawn, abstract polyhedron shapes (free-form, geometric, polygonal) on a white background. The shapes are irregular, multi-faceted, and vary in size. No photographic elements are present.
- **Iconography**: No icon set or individual icons are visible on this page.
- **Layout grid**: The page uses a clean, minimal grid with ample white space. The header text is aligned to the top-left, the main heading and body copy are aligned to the bottom-left, and the geometric shapes are centered on the page. Margins appear generous (left, right, top, bottom) to emphasize the shapes.
- **Geometric / decorative elements**: The primary visual elements are five abstract polyhedron shapes (free-form, polygonal, multi-faceted) drawn with thin black lines. No additional decorative elements (patterns, gradients, or other shapes) are present.

## Page Layout Summary
The page has a top-left header ("Brand Visuals & Guidelines | by Sightbox") and a top-right logo. The main content is divided into two sections: a text block (page number "1.1", heading "Elements", subheading "SHAPES", and body copy) aligned to the bottom-left, and five abstract polyhedron shapes centered on the page. The layout is balanced, with generous white space to highlight the geometric shapes and text.

## Design Rules / Guidance Visible on Page
- The shapes are described as "free-form, abstract polyhedrons" that align with the "visual style of the Meerkats" and serve as "containers for city images." No explicit do/don't rules or usage guidelines are printed on the page beyond this descriptive text.
